view.title: Validate persona scenario #4
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The evidence does not provide sufficient information to validate the scenario of waiting for sold-out group events.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The evidence does not provide sufficient information to validate the scenario of waiting for sold-out group events.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the persona scenario of waiting for sold-out group events, but the evidence does not confirm whether this scenario was executed or what the outcomes were. The prior steps indicate that only two customers booked the tour, which is below the minimum requirement of four participants, leading to uncertainty about the scenario's behavior. Therefore, without clear evidence of the scenario being tested or its outcomes, the validation remains inconclusive.
